steps.label: Participant Intake Information Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter or search for participant information as part of the intake process. Please provide all required details about the individual being registered. The system will use this information to search for existing records and prevent duplicates. Guidance is provided for each field, and you will be prompted to search the Master Client Index (MCI) before proceeding. Ensure all mandatory fields are completed accurately. If you are unsure about any field, hover over the info icon for additional help.

fields.label: Middle Name
fields.error_message: Middle Name must be valid text.

fields.label: Email
fields.error_message: Email must be a valid email address.

fields.label: Social Security Number
fields.error_message: SSN must be a valid format.

data_validation: Birth date cannot be in the future.
Phone number must be valid format.
SSN must be unique if provided.
If Relationship is 'Spouse', cannot have duplicate spouse entries.
If Relationship is 'Child', age must be less than 18.
If Relationship is 'Parent', age must be at least 18.
Email must be valid format if provided.

buttons.label: Search in MCI
buttons.description: Click to search the Master Client Index for existing records matching the entered information.

steps.label: Search Master Client Index (MCI)
steps.description: Upon clicking the 'Search in MCI' button, the system queries the Master Client Index (MCI) using the entered Name (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name), Date of Birth, and Social Security Number (if provided). The system returns a list of potential matches or indicates that no match was found. If matches are found, they are displayed for user selection. If no match is found, the system prompts the user to create a new client record.

rules.label: Trigger MCI Search
rules.logic: When the 'Search in MCI' button is clicked, validate that required fields (First Name, Last Name, Date of Birth) are populated. If validation passes, construct a search query using First Name, Middle Name (if provided), Last Name, Date of Birth, and Social Security Number (if provided) to query the Master Client Index (MCI).

rules.label: Return Search Results
rules.logic: If the MCI returns one or more matches, display the list of matching individuals to the Intake Specialist for review and selection.

rules.label: Handle No Match
rules.logic: If the MCI returns no matches, display a prompt to the Intake Specialist to create a new client record.

steps.label: Review MCI Search Results and Client Selection
steps.description: After searching the Master Client Index, you will see a list of potential matches based on the information you entered. Review the results carefully to determine if the participant already exists in the system. Select an existing individual if a match is found, or choose to create a new client record if no match is appropriate. This step helps prevent duplicate records and ensures accurate client tracking. You will be guided to either link the intake to an existing client or initiate a new client creation process.

fields.label: Select Existing Individual
fields.error_message: Please select an individual if a match is found.

data_validation: If an existing individual is selected, must confirm selection before proceeding.
Cannot proceed without either selecting an individual or choosing to create a new client record.

buttons.label: Create New Client Record
buttons.description: Click to create a new client record if no suitable match is found in the search results.

steps.label: Create New Client Record
steps.description: Upon clicking the 'Create New Client Record' button, the system creates a new client record using the entered required fields: Name (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name), Date of Birth, Gender, Address (Street Address, City, State, Zip Code). Additional domain-specific fields such as Relationship to Primary Client, Phone, Email (if provided), and Language Preference are also saved. The system assigns a unique client identifier and links the new record to the current intake session.

rules.label: Validate Required Fields
rules.logic: On 'Create New Client Record' button click, validate that all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Date of Birth, Gender, Street Address, City, State, Zip Code, Relationship to Primary Client, Phone, Language Preference) are populated. Middle Name and Email are optional.

rules.label: Create Client Record
rules.logic: If validation passes, create a new client record in the system using all provided field values.

rules.label: Assign Unique Identifier
rules.logic: Generate and assign a unique client identifier to the new client record.

rules.label: Link to Intake Session
rules.logic: Associate the newly created client record with the current intake session for tracking and audit purposes.
